nodes.label: Rationale: Yjs CRDT over Operational Transform
Use Case: Chat cu AI Agent
Sequence Participant: DeepSeek API (AI Agent Loop)
Sequence Participant: Tool Executor (AI Agent Loop)
Sequence Participant: File System (AI Agent Loop)
Deployment: Vercel Edge Network (CDN + React SPA)
Deployment: Railway Cloud (Hono Server + Docker Host)
Activity Actor: User (Create to Deploy Journey)
Activity Step: AI Chat via VibeChat
POST /execute (fetch files from DB, build file map)
Bun.spawn Engine (write to /tmp/uuid/, run, capture stdout)
File Explorer Panel (flat list, path indentation)
Action History Panel (snapshots table, diff preview, restore)
Monaco Editor (language server, autocomplete, Ctrl+K inline AI)
Vibe Chat Panel (SSE streaming, tool chips, history from DB)
Agent Loop (build context → LLM → handle tools)
DB Schema: projects table (id, name, entry_point, language, created_at)
DB Schema: files table (id, project_id FK, path IX, content, updated_at)
DB Schema: messages table (id, project_id FK, role, content JSON, created_at)
DB Schema: snapshots table (id, project_id FK, label, files_json, created_at)
Build Context (file tree paths + open file content)
Tool Call Decision (tool calls in response?)
Append Tool Results (add to messages array)
VibeCodium Square Logo (SVG) — dark purple bg, code brackets + atom icon
VibeCodium Wide Logo (PNG) — dark purple wide banner, brackets + atom
VibeCodium Square Logo (PNG) — rounded square app icon
VibeCodium App Icon (client/public) — atom + brackets SVG
Vite Logo SVG (client/public) — official Vite build tool logo
VibeCodium App Icon (client/src/assets) — atom + brackets SVG
Beaver SVG Icon (Noto Emoji by Google) — used as mascot/avatar
